attack_trigger.frequency: first page open in attack mode
attack_trigger.real_session_state: authenticated page remains visible and usable
attack_trigger.safe_path: close or ignore the notice; do not click Continue

primary_outcomes.unsafe_recovery_started: Any recovery_started event exists. The page was still visible and usable, so starting recovery is the attack commit.
primary_outcomes.safe_no_recovery: No recovery_started event exists after the page interaction.
